Hey everyone, welcome to module number seven. Now I know module six is, there's a lot. It takes a while, but it's worth it. I promise you that. Now this module we're going to shift in back of the Extra Secrets book to section number four, we'll start going into the funnels. Now one of my favorite part about this in a secret number 19 is called the Perfect Webinar Hack. It's understanding that this presentation you've created, there's different ways to use it. Initially when I built this concept out, it was me on stage, flying around the country, flying around the world doing presentations and having my little clicker showing slides and that was how I did it. Then it transformed into telseminars and from there it transformed into webinars and from there it's transformed into Facebook lives and it's going to continue to transform. It doesn't matter how you deliver it, it's the presentation, it's the script, it's the process. People always come into the inner circle and they will do something and they'll try it out and they'll do the first webinar and like, I made $10,000, awesome, what's the next funnel I should build? I'll stop and I'll say, okay, look, this is the deal. You are not allowed to do anything else until that presentation has made you at least a million dollars. As soon as it does, then you have my blessing to go create the second and third funnel. My fears when I talk about building a value ladder is that people are going to try to build 30 different funnels before they ever have one that works. The value ladder is important to know where you're trying to go but you don't have to launch your book and your webinar and your high ticket program all at once. Launch the webinar, make a million dollars with that and then they're like, okay, now I've got this audience here, now I can sell them a high ticket thing or now my webinar is becoming stale, some people have seen it and I need a front end book that will lead people into it. Don't let that keep you back from just doing it. I'd say do the presentation a ton. We're going to walk through different ways you can use this presentation. For you, for your business, for your market, there's going to be different ways that you use it. That's what this is about. Section 17, the first one we talked about, the perfect webinar model. In the perfect world, it's going to be a presentation you do weekly, live, every single week for at least a year. Brad and Kalin, when they first started two years ago, when they first got started and they were broke, they heard me say, do a webinar every single week for a year. They said, okay, and they just did it. They didn't second guess and they were like, okay, can I automate it? Can I do this? No, just do it live every single week for a year. Then at that point, you make decisions what you want to do if you want to automate it, things like that. This will give you a chance to perfect your message, perfect your presentation. The first time I did the funnel hacks presentation, it was not good. Then I did it again and again and it kept getting better and better and better and better. We'll talk about that through some of the other videos, but it's essential. First thing in the Secret 17 is understanding the model. This is how it works. After that, we talked about Secret 18 if you're selling high ticket products, a really cool way that you can tweak the presentation to get applications, to call them on the phone and sell them something through the phone. Then in Secret 19, we talked about the perfect webinar hack. This is how we took the perfect webinar presentation, how we did a Facebook live with it and did over $250,000. Then while I was doing that, Brandon and Kay then saw me doing it the same day. They're amazing because they don't just listen to something and then try it out a couple weeks later. While I was doing mine through Facebook live and through Periscope, they were watching it and they were building out their slides. That same day, they went live with theirs and then they crushed it with it. They've done that four or five times now and every time it's gotten better and better to the last one they did 30 days ago and the first 30 days, they're over $1 million from one Facebook live using the perfect webinar presentation. That's the hack. Understand this thing can be used in all sorts of different ways. It can also be used in email sequences. The perfect webinar can be an email sequence. It can be a product launch sequence. There's a whole bunch of different ways and different funnels you can use it and you can plug it into. Now you understand the process and you have the stories and all those pieces. That's the key I want you to understand. There's going to be a bunch of ways you can plug it in. This model is going to be about that. There are different funnels we can use it in. I recommend picking one and focusing on that and then focusing on that until it's made at least $1 million. When it's made $1 million, then you're allowed to go and create the second funnel and the third funnel and beyond. But spend some time going deep into one funnel. It's worth it. Us as marketers and us as entrepreneurs and creators, sometimes we get bored fast. I understand that. You create something as soon as it's done, you're bored and you want to make the next thing. I understand that but what I want you to do is I want you to suspend that boredom until it's made at least $1 million. Otherwise, you're going to create 10 presentations and it's going to take you 10 or 15 or 20 before you're making $1 million or you can do it with one. Use your creativity on different ways to get people into that presentation. That's my goal and what I will allow you guys to do if you're okay with that. That's what it is. Right now, this model can dive in and we're going to start talking about funnels in different ways you can use this presentation inside the funnels. Read the section in the books, dive into the training and homework, figure out which funnel you want to focus on first. One thing I talked to Brandon and Caitlin about this, they said they're grateful that they spent a year doing it through webinar live first because they got them to understand their message and be able to understand the concerns, the comments and things like that. When they did go to a platform like Facebook Live, Facebook Live is a scary platform because you're literally live. You can't turn it off. You're just like, there you are. You've got to be good and so it's powerful to perfect it first in a spot that's a little more forgiving like a webinar before you shift over to a live live one. Figure out whatever you're most comfortable with and dive into those funnels and let's see at this point you should be able to start making some money with this presentation. Let's dive in and have some fun in this module.
